events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: missing check valve causing gravity flow in boiler & pump piping, tested/inspected stage. This is a defect/non-compliance. Decision should be fail. Risk: gravity flow can cause unwanted circulation, potential damage, safety/operational issue - medium to high. I'll say high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: since tested/inspected, maybe 90. Value 0. Confidence high. Findings and actions. References: mfr manuals, hydronics references, IPC/ASME maybe.

  "rationale": "A missing check valve permitting gravity flow is a non-compliant defect in hydronic boiler/pump piping.
